name: AWS S3 Server Access Logging Disabled For A Bucket
description: Detects instances where server access logging is disabled for an Amazon S3 bucket. Indicates a potential security misconfiguration or an attempt to conceal access activities. Attacker can compromises visibility into S3 bucket access, hindering audit trails and accountability for data interactions.

rules.name: AWS S3 Server Access Logging Disabled For A Bucket

author: Nikki Madayag & Yash Verma
